playbook.intent: Quarter closes with retro + lessons learned, next-quarter OKRs published, top 3 feature bets sized + sequenced into roadmap, capacity confirmed per squad, and every role (PM, PdM, Architect, BA, Dev leads, DevOps, QA, Growth) knows what they own. Output is a roadmap doc, OKR sheet, RACI per bet, and a populated backlog under `backlog/`.
playbook.scope: Quarter closes with retro + lessons learned, next-quarter OKRs published, top 3 feature bets sized + sequenced into roadmap, capacity confirmed per squad, and every role (PM, PdM, Architect, BA, Dev leads, DevOps, QA, Growth) knows what they own. Output is a roadmap doc, OKR sheet, RACI per bet, and a populated backlog under `backlog/`.

success-criteria.criterion: All 5 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Close Last Quarter

tasks.task: Score every key result with evidence on a 0.0-1.0 scale
Run a 60-min retro on what dragged outcomes

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when the close memo is published to the team.

stage.name: Pick Quarterly Outcomes

tasks.task: Draft outcome candidates from strategy + retro signal
Cut to 3 maximum; tie each to a business metric

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 3 outcomes are signed off by leadership.

stage.name: Define KRs

tasks.task: Validate that every KR has a data source and an owner
Stress-test KRs against ambition vs realism

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every KR is measurable and owned.

stage.name: Plan First 4 Weeks
stage.intent: Don't wait for week 5 to start moving.

tasks.task: Translate each KR into the first 4 weeks of work
Set the weekly OKR check-in cadence

stage.decision-gate: Advance when week-1 work is in the tracker.

stage.name: Communicate

tasks.task: Each team writes how their work maps to the OKRs
Pin the OKR doc + dashboard in shared space

stage.decision-gate: Required output: every team has a written mapping to the OKRs.
